text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whewie! My shoulders feel like mashed roe! I must've had 
so much tension built up. Director, this massage machine 
really works wonders!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Objection! This is not a massage machine!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What a wild turn of events. Grass, El, are you both okay?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: We're golden! ¡No te preocupes! The machine was super fun.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, but I should tell you one thing, King…

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You're dead wrong about who's the world's weakest.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Right, Grass? No way I'm the world's weakest, right?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Of course not. What you did today was remarkable. 
Your performance was amazing.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
¡Claro que sí! But in the end, you stole 
the spotlight with that final blow.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Only because you showed me the way.

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
What?! How are you accelerating so fast? 
I thought you'd used up all your skills!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I don't need any fantasy skills! This is a racecourse, 
the place where a horsegirl's true magic shines!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: What matters most is power and endurance!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Those words helped me see past the legend's lightning 
metaphors to my true innate power. You see…

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We're blessed with incredible leg strength, as well 
as enough physical fortitude to withstand the potion 
sickness debuff…

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I put the pieces together and realized that a titanic horsegirl's 
kick would strike harder than any bolt.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Just like when you won the race. Even with all the magic flying
around, your own two legs are what carried you to the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You said it yourself. We put everything on the line 
for the sake of one thing — victory.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Even in the face of danger, our desire to reach 
the finish line remains unshaken.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And while the game world was fictional, 
we weren't just playing around.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I ran as fast as I could, just like in real races!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. The shining goddess who lends power to Uma Nest's 
adventurers is just a character, but…

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Our Goddess of Victory motivates us to keep running, 
no matter when or where.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ¡Sí! You hit the nail on the head!!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Ooh! I'm… so… inspired!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
This VR Umalator is designed not only to help horsegirls 
acquire new skills, but to develop new bonds as well!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Things didn't go quite to plan this time, but we're working on
updating the system to connect with even more worlds!

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: Wait, so you're planning to expand this function?

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
I need to install a fail-safe program just in case things get 
out of hand again… Forced shutdowns are too risky, and I 
doubt I'd be allowed to do one anyway…

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: This time, it was the legend. Next time…

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Did you say something, Tazuna?

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: No, I was just talking to myself♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nyahaha. Still, this looks like a great way to kill some time. 
I can't wait for the next installment♪

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: So, who wants to be our next challenger?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Again?! I'll give it another shot! I wanna go! 
And Grass, I want you with me!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El… Haven't you had your fair share of fun already?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No way! I say keep the challenges comin' and comin'! 
Let's play together more!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hey Director, where's the coin slot on this thing? 
Oh, and does it take pesos?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El, that's enough. We have training today, remember?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But Grass! It's one more go! Just one!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You're like a little child… If you don't stop 
your whining, you won't get any dinner.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Anything but thaaaat!
